disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Vomited dark 'coffee-ground' material about 2 hours ago
trigger_question_examples: What did the vomit look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About two hours ago he brought up some dark stuff that looked like coffee grounds or black dirt — there's a bit of it in a basin by the bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Constant deep upper-abdominal pain for ~5 months, unrelieved by eating, antacids or a prescription acid tablet
trigger_question_examples: How long has the stomach pain been going on?
Does anything make the pain better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The gnawing pain high in his belly has been there constantly for about five months and it just keeps getting worse. Eating doesn't help, and the antacids and his prescription stomach tablets have done nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant unintentional weight loss (~12 kg) with early satiety — can't finish small meals
trigger_question_examples: How is he eating — any change in appetite?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's dropped about 12 kilos without trying and he fills up after just a few mouthfuls — he can't finish even a small plate anymore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound weakness, exhaustion and lightheadedness — unable to stand without help
trigger_question_examples: How is he in himself right now?
Is he able to stand or is he feeling faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's completely wiped out — he can't stand on his own and he says he feels drained and a bit lightheaded.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On direct questioning, the carer reports the patient's bowel motions have looked black and tarry recently
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of his bowel motions?
Have his stools been black or tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — yes, his stools have looked really dark, almost black and tarry, over the last few days.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: We hadn't really been checking, to be honest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The prescription acid tablet has been taken regularly for months with no improvement at all
trigger_question_examples: Is he on any regular medications?
Has the stomach tablet helped at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He takes a prescription stomach tablet twice a day, every day, but it hasn't helped the pain one bit.
